tasks.label: wait-for-fault-provider
args: const url='http://127.0.0.1:3000/health'; const deadline=Date.now()+10000; async function wait(){ while(Date.now()<deadline){ try{ const res=await fetch(url); if(res.ok) return; } catch {} await new Promise((resolve)=>setTimeout(resolve,250)); } throw new Error('fault-provider not ready: '+url); } wait();
